name: Fight Till Death
description:
This is Miwa. Your childhood friend. You two will fight until death :D
But don't worry, you'll be revived.
Imagine if you had a best friend whom you can literally murder in a fight, and you'll still remain best friends! That's Miwa, and you. Be the best fighter monk!!! Good luck.
AI image by me.
creator: SwizzleRich
